name: Bountiful Black Bean Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Place beans in a large saucepan.
2. Add enough water to cover the beans by 1 inch.
3. Bring mixture to boil over high heat.
4. Boil for 1 minute, then remove from heat and cover tightly.
5. Let stand for 1 hour (or soak overnight in cold water).
6. Drain the beans.
7. Combine beans with chicken broth, celery, carrots, onions, and lemon zest in a Dutch oven or soup kettle.
8. Bring to boil over high heat, then reduce heat to low.
9. Simmer uncovered until liquid is just below the surface of the beans and ingredients are very tender (2 1/2 to 3 hours).
10. Using a slotted spoon, transfer soup solids in batches to a food processor and puree.
11. Return puree to Dutch oven and stir in lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
12. Cook over medium heat until heated through.
13. Serve with lemon slices in each bowl. Makes about 3 quarts (10-12 servings).
